name: Potion of Healing
description: You regain 2d4+2 hit points when you drink this potion.

name: Wand of Magic Missiles
description: This wand has 7 charges. Expend 1 or more to cast Magic Missile.

name: Example Extradimensional Bag
description: This example bag ignores the weight of items placed inside it — only its own weight counts toward encumbrance.

name: Example Warmth Ring
description: Example ring — carrying it protects the wearer from cold environments while attuned.
